same dMMR frameshift mechanism as COAD_MSI
gastric has a dMMR/MSI-H subset (~22%) contributing frameshift load; bulk cohort intermediate

SNV-dominated (APOBEC); indel proportion near pan-cancer baseline

baseline; HRD drives structural not frameshift load
